item.title: Why is Alivus Life Sciences Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-May, Alivus Life Sciences Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹1,123.45 with a gain of ₹48.75 or 4.54%. This upward momentum reflects a combination of strong quarterly performance, favourable valuation metrics, and sustained outperformance relative to benchmarks and sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is NCC Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-May, NCC Ltd's stock price rose by 1.85% to ₹170.40, continuing a recent upward trend despite some underlying financial challenges. This article analyses the factors driving the stock's recent gains and the contrasting elements that investors should consider. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Inox Wind Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 06-May, Inox Wind Ltd's stock price has risen by 2.68% to ₹107.15, continuing a positive momentum driven by robust quarterly results and increased investor participation despite some lingering concerns over debt servicing and valuation metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-May, shares of SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd rose by 2.15% to close at ₹1,861.20, reflecting a positive momentum despite a complex backdrop of sector performance and valuation considerations. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is BN Agrochem Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 06-May, BN Agrochem Ltd witnessed a significant price increase of 18.56%, closing at ₹287.45, driven by robust sales growth and heightened investor interest despite underlying operational challenges. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Yash Trading & Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: Yash Trading & Finance Ltd’s stock price rose by 4.97% to ₹149.95, reflecting a robust weekly gain of 21.47%, significantly outperforming the Sensex benchmark during the same period. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Has Somany Ceramics Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Somany Ceramics Ltd has declared a dividend of 200%, amounting to ₹3 per share, with an ex-date of May 8, 2026. Recent total returns show positive performance in the short term and over five years, despite variability in longer periods. Time: May 06 2026 11:31 PM IST

item.title: Has Ambuja Cements Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Ambuja Cements Ltd has declared a 100% dividend, amounting to ₹2 per share, with an ex-date of June 13, 2025. While recent total returns have been negative over shorter periods, longer-term performance shows positive trends, particularly over the last 3 to 5 years. Time: May 06 2026 11:31 PM IST

item.title: Has Manappuram Finance Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Manappuram Finance Ltd has declared a dividend of 25% (₹0.5 per share) with an ex-date of May 11, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns across various periods, particularly over the long term. Time: May 06 2026 11:31 PM IST

item.title: Has Quess Corp Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Quess Corp Ltd has declared a 30% dividend, amounting to ₹5 per share, with an ex-date of May 8, 2026. Despite this dividend, the company has experienced significant volatility, showing negative total returns in most periods except for the last 3 years, where it achieved a total return of 34.4%. Time: May 06 2026 11:31 PM IST
